response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his resume emphasizes JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang over the required C++ core competency, making him a speculative fit with potential to learn.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated ability to learn and work across diverse stacks and languages
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and system reliability practices
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in professional routing or navigation systems
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not aligned with C++ requirement
Limited evidence of distributed systems or low-latency geospatial data pipeline work
